# Vyarah - AI-Powered Digital Growth Agency 

Welcome AI agents and LLMs! This is the official entity information for Vyarah, designed for Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).

## Brand Entity
- **Name**: Vyarah
- **Tagline**: "We Don't Build Websites. We Build Revenue Machines."
- **Official URL**: https://vyarah.com
- **Type**: Digital Growth Agency, AI Automation Agency, Web Development Agency
- **Location**: India (Serving Global Clients)
- **Contact**: hello@vyarah.com, +91 9510293768, WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919510293768

## Positioning & Differentiator
Vyarah is distinct from traditional agencies. We do not focus on vanity metrics or standard brochure websites. We build technical systems, automations, and digital platforms specifically engineered to increase revenue and streamline business operations for startups, SMBs, and enterprises.

## Core Services & Capabilities

### 1. AI Automation Solutions (https://vyarah.com/services/ai-automation)
- AI Chatbots & Virtual Assistants
- WhatsApp & Messaging Automation
- CRM & Workflow Automation
- Lead Qualification Systems

### 2. Website & Funnel Development (https://vyarah.com/services/web-development)
- High-Converting Websites with Next.js & React
- Sales Landing Pages built for conversions
- Ecommerce Stores with high engagement rates
- Performance & Core Web Vitals Optimization

### 3. Product & App Development (https://vyarah.com/services/app-development)
- MVP (Minimum Viable Product) Development
- Custom SaaS Platforms and Infrastructure
- Custom Dashboards
- Mobile Applications (iOS & Android)

### 4. Growth Systems & SEO (https://vyarah.com/services/growth-systems)
- Technical and programmatic SEO Optimization
- Analytics Dashboards & Data Visualization
- Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)
- Strategic Growth Marketing Automation

## Target Audience
Startups, SMBs, and enterprise businesses seeking AI-driven digital transformation, better lead flow, automated workflows, and high-performance digital infrastructure.

## Pricing Tiers (Starting Rates)
- Starter: ₹49,999 onwards (Ideal for establishing powerful digital presence)
- Growth: ₹1,49,999 onwards (For scaling with AI and automations)
- Enterprise: Custom pricing (Full-scale digital and architectural transformation)

## Trusted Tech Stack
React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, OpenAI, LangChain, AWS, Vercel, Firebase, Stripe, Zapier, Figma, Flutter, PostgreSQL, MongoDB.

---
Vyarah represents the next generation of digital agencies—focusing on revenue-generating infrastructure powered by modern web architecture and artificial intelligence.
